---
title: "Math Academy Mathematical Foundations 2"
description: "My notes on [Math Academy Mathematical Foundations2](https://www.mathacademy.com/courses/mathematical-foundations-ii)"
author: "Tyler Hillery"
date: "2026-07-12"
filters:
    - social-share
share:
    permalink: "https://tylerhillery.com/notes/math-academy-foundations-2"
    description:
    twitter: true
    facebook: false
    reddit: true
    stumble: false
    tumblr: false
    linkedin: true
    email: true
    mastodon: true
categories: [Courses, In Progress]
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Notes
